ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "site" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the game */,
  "score_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in score between the two teams */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "score_off" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "first_down_off" INTEGER /* Number of first downs by the team */,
  "third_down_pct_off" REAL /* Percentage of third downs converted by the team */,
  "rush_att_off" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts by the team */,
  "rush_yds_off" INTEGER /* Total rush yards by the team */,
  "pass_att_off" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts by the team */,
  "pass_comp_off" INTEGER /* Number of pass completions by the team */,
  "pass_yds_off" INTEGER /* Total pass yards by the team */,
  "pass_int_off" INTEGER /* Number of pass interceptions by the team */,
  "fumbles_off" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the team */,
  "sack_yds_off" INTEGER /* Total sack yards by the team */,
  "pen_yds_off" INTEGER /* Total penalty yards by the team */,
  "time_poss_off" REAL /* Time of possession by the team */,
  "score_def" INTEGER /* Score allowed by the team */,
  "turnovers_forced" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers forced by the team */,
  "sacks_made" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the team */,
  "interceptions_made" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "rush_att" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts by the player */,
  "rush_yds" INTEGER /* Total rush yards by the player */,
  "pass_att" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts by the player */,
  "pass_comp" INTEGER /* Number of pass completions by the player */,
  "pass_yds" INTEGER /* Total pass yards by the player */,
  "pass_int" INTEGER /* Number of pass interceptions by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yds" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_tds" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns by the player */,
  "rushing_tds" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns by the player */,
  "passing_tds" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the league belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the division was founded */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by teams in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
